full_text:
Feng Fang 馮方
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Fang (馮方). Father of Yuan Shu’s wife, a Han offical willing to slander those that excluded him. Feng Fang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
